TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cory Alexander == Cory Alexander sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1973, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1995 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. Cory Alexande syobay mzyu mari pqwasan biru maki Richmond,Virginia . kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®orj alexan*er == ¶~ ®orj alexan*er s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a *ir…£inia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu s~…ēan antonio s~…ēpurs~…ē. ¶~ ®orj alexan*e s~…ējoő≤aj mzju mari pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru maki ri ¶~ ®ńßmon*,*ir…£inia . kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Cory Alexander == Cory Alexander sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1973, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1995 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. Cory Alexande syobay mzyu mari pqwasan biru maki Richmond,Virginia . kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®orj alexan*er == ¶~ ®orj alexan*er s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a *ir…£inia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu s~…ēan antonio s~…ēpurs~…ē. ¶~ ®orj alexan*e s~…ējoő≤aj mzju mari pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru maki ri ¶~ ®ńßmon*,*ir…£inia . kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
